blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,672 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 18.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 26" over the past week. Current depth: 66".
